summary: Completed testing of P2 features: Full payment upfront with refund tiers, Escrow system, Multi-spot trip planning, and Group booking discounts. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend components verified via code review.
critical_code_review_comments: Booking model has escrow fields: escrow_amount, escrow_status, content_delivered, content_delivered_at
Profile model has group discount fields: group_discount_2_plus, group_discount_3_plus, group_discount_5_plus
complete_booking endpoint (lines 635-678) marks booking as completed and checks content delivery
mark_content_delivered endpoint (lines 681-719) releases escrow when booking is completed
release_escrow helper function (lines 722-756) credits photographer when both conditions met
ScheduledBookingDrawer has AccountCreditSection with escrow protection and cancellation policy notices
BookingConfirmation has 'Add Another Spot' button (data-testid='add-another-spot-btn') for multi-spot trips
PhotographerBookingsManager has Group Booking Discounts section with NumericSteppers for 2+, 3+, 5+ surfers
seed_data_creation: Used existing test bookings for cancellation and escrow tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 features fully tested: 1) Cancellation refund tiers working - POST /api/bookings/{id}/cancel returns refund_percentage and refund_policy string, 2) Escrow system implemented - booking creation sets escrow_status='held' and escrow_amount, 3) POST /api/bookings/{id}/complete marks booking completed, 4) POST /api/bookings/{id}/content-delivered releases escrow when booking is completed, 5) Group discounts configurable via PUT /api/photographer/{id}/pricing with group_discount_2_plus, group_discount_3_plus, group_discount_5_plus fields (capped at 50%), 6) Frontend has 'Add Another Spot' button in BookingConfirmation, 7) PhotographerBookingsManager has group discount NumericSteppers in pricing modal

escrow_system.booking_creation: Sets escrow_status='held' and escrow_amount for confirmed bookings
escrow_system.content_delivered: POST /api/bookings/{id}/content-delivered releases escrow when booking completed
escrow_system.release_escrow: Credits photographer 80% after platform fee when both conditions met

multi_spot_trip_planning.button: Add Another Spot to This Trip
multi_spot_trip_planning.callback: onAddAnotherSpot resets form for next spot
